name: Charleston-Huntington
author: PSWBSF
description:
Extends from Charleston, West Virginia in the east to Ironton, Ohio in the west. Main cities include Charleston and Huntington in West Virginia, Ashland in Kentucky, and Ironton in Ohio.

Made using the Map Patcher by Kronifer and US Demand Generator by slurry.

  • Airports: WV International Yeager Airport (CRW), Huntington Tri-State Airport (HTS)

  • Universities: Marshall University, West Virginia State University, University of Charleston, BridgeValley Community and Technical College, Ashland Community and Technical College, Ohio University Southern

  • Entertainment/Tourism: West Virginia Capitol, Joan C. Edwards Stadium, University of Charleston Stadium, Charleston, Huntington, and Ashland Malls

Note: The name of the city in game is just Huntington since Charleston-Huntington was too long and Charleston is also a city in South Carolina
